trends.name: Institutional Bitcoin Adoption via ETFs
trends.summary: Spot Bitcoin ETFs are becoming a key component of institutional investment strategies, driving demand and liquidity. Allocations range from 1-5% for low-volatility entry to 5-15% during bull cycles.
trends.evidence: “Bitcoin ETFs have become a cornerstone of portfolio diversification strategies for institutions… endowments and sovereign funds typically allocate 1–5% of their portfolios to Bitcoin ETFs…”

trends.name: Ethereum's Layer 1 Foundation & L2 Evolution
trends.summary: Ethereum is maintaining its foundational role despite L2 scaling solutions. Focus is shifting towards security (restaking, danksharding), interoperability, and a value capture model based on staking/restaking yields.
trends.evidence: “…ETH will continue to play a foundational role…acting as both the primary unit of account and as necessary collateral…”, “ETH's value capture model moves from gas fee burning to security settlement services…”

trends.name: Regulatory Uncertainty - CLARITY Act
trends.summary: The CLARITY Act of 2025 faces a critical deadline for Senate markup (April 25, 2026). Failure to pass could delay comprehensive crypto regulation in the US until 2030.
trends.evidence: “Senator Thom Tillis' continued negotiation…may narrow the timeline for allowing the crypto Clarity Act to pass this year…”, “The Senate Banking Committee must schedule a markup by April 25, 2026…”

trends.name: Cross-Chain Interoperability Solutions
trends.summary: Platforms facilitating seamless cross-chain swaps and asset transfers are gaining traction, addressing fragmentation and improving user experience. Examples include Rango Exchange and NEAR Intents.
trends.evidence: “Swap any tokens instantly cross-chain…”, “Seamlessly access all liquidity sources, optimize trade execution across chains…”

trends.name: Data Availability (DA) Landscape
trends.summary: The data availability landscape is evolving with EigenDA and Ethereum's danksharding roadmap offering competitive solutions, lowering costs while maintaining security. DA represents a significant portion of L2 operating costs.
trends.evidence: “EigenDA’s competitive advantage will be its Ethereum-aligned security guarantees via restaking…”, “Data availability represents 90% of L2 operating costs post-EIP-4844.”
